data.description: Deferred hardening (accepted limitation, ADR 0046). Certification issues from a SINGLE secure/controlled environment (by design for the FISMA-Moderate target) — no threshold/multi-sig. TUF+gittuf use thresholds for high-authority roots. Future option: threshold signing for required-environment keys, or (minimum) a documented key-compromise/rotation runbook. The out-of-band pinned trust root partially mitigates. Not scheduled.
data.title: Threshold/multi-party signing OR documented compromise-response runbook for required-environment keys
